events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need identify component/condition: structural welding defect: visible undercut/porosity/incomplete fusion. Stage rough-complete. Condition installed-defective. Decision fail because non-compliant weld defects. Risk high? Structural welding defects can compromise strength; high. Need findings list visible defect cues: undercut, porosity, incomplete fusion. Actions: remove/repair defective welds per WPS/ASME/AWS, re-inspect. References AWS D1.1. Need percent_complete maybe 80? rough-complete. Value 0. Confidence 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty, sound_source empty. Ensure valid JSON.
